attacking_style: Attacks from breakaways on Cat-1 climbs and MTFs, typically making decisive move on final categorized ascent. Bridges solo from peloton to breakaways on final climbs when opportunity arises.
team_tactics: Used as final high-tempo pacer for UAE GC leaders (Almeida) before their attacks at 5-6km. Given freedom to target KOM jersey and breakaway stages when not serving GC protection role.
terrain_preference: Cat-1 mountain finishes from breakaways, particularly in adverse weather (rain, fog, cold). Excels on sustained climbs where he can establish rhythm and drop breakaway companions. Vulnerable on wet technical descents and exposed positioning in nervous flat finales.
vulnerability: Poor wet weather handling (lost 10min staying with group in rain, descent mistake). Accumulates fatigue across stage races affecting late-race climbing. Inadequate positioning in crash-prone situations. Illness susceptibility during Grand Tours.
key_patterns: Won multiple Vuelta stages from breakaways on Cat-1 finishes, attacking final climb (3 wins documented)
Systematically targets KOM jersey when not on GC duty, prioritizing points over stage wins
Bridges solo from peloton to quality breakaways on final climbs, immediate acceleration drops competitors
Performance deteriorates with accumulated race fatigue and adverse weather, especially rain/wet roads
Crashes at critical moments, both mid-stage recoverable and race-ending exits while competing for jerseys
Strong time trialist for climber profile, won Romandie overall on consistency without stage wins
form_trajectory: negative: 2023 Giro showed fragility with weather-related time losses, positioning errors, and illness leading to Vuelta crash-out. Sharp decline from dominant 2022 Vuelta breakaway performances.
